body_txt: Rainbow manipulation is the power to create or control rainbow energy, whether this be a regular immaterial rainbow, a solidified construct that can be travelled on , or an energy attack that looks like a rainbow. If a setting has color-coded Elemental Powers , the rainbow is likely a combination of them all . Alternatively, abilities drawn from The Power of Love may be rainbow-based due to their association with happiness and luck in Western media. Depending on how closely the setting follows the nature of Real Life rainbows, these powers can be considered a form of Light 'em Up , or potentially as a mix of Making a Splash and The Power of the Sun since rainbows are a meteorological phenomenon created by sunlight reflecting and refracting off of water droplets within Earth's atmosphere. When this power shows up, it's almost always in the hands of a hero or heroine (likely because rainbows are made of light, and Light Is Good ), but it's not entirely unheard of for villains to have this ability. It's very commonly wielded as a love-based power by unicorns or other beings of good as a Care-Bear Stare . Leprechauns may also possess this power because of their association with the ends of rainbows. Sub-Trope of Everything's Better with Rainbows and Rainbow Motif , both of which may in-universe be results of someone using this power rather than causes. If more accurate to real life, it also becomes a Sub-Trope of Weather Manipulation . Super-Trope to Ride the Rainbow .
